Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. I traced $2B in grants and 45 states' lobbying behind age‑verification bills 87 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Understanding the Go Runtime: The Scheduler 121 upvotes, 15 comments
  3. Prefix sums at gigabytes per second with ARM NEON 48 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. The Met releases high-def 3D scans of 140 famous art objects 294 upvotes, 59 comments
  5. Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image 22 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference 133 upvotes, 30 comments
  7. IMG_0416 (2024) 103 upvotes, 22 comments
  8. Vite 8.0 Is Out 331 upvotes, 91 comments
  9. Bubble Sorted Amen Break 344 upvotes, 104 comments
  10. Malus – Clean Room as a Service 1301 upvotes, 473 comments
  11. Shall I implement it? No 1315 upvotes, 482 comments
  12. Worldwide Sidewalk Joy: Adding whimsy to neighborhoods 23 upvotes, 3 comments
  13. Willingness to look stupid 385 upvotes, 130 comments
  14. Celebrating Interesting Flickr Technologies 43 upvotes, 9 comments
  15. “This is not the computer for you” 522 upvotes, 208 comments
  16. Enhancing gut-brain communication reversed cognitive decline in aging mice 317 upvotes, 133 comments
  17. Ceno, browse the web without internet access 35 upvotes, 9 comments
  18. Document poisoning in RAG systems: How attackers corrupt AI's sources 124 upvotes, 50 comments
  19. Bucketsquatting is (finally) dead 101 upvotes, 44 comments
  20. Show HN: fftool – A Terminal UI for FFmpeg – Shows Command Before It Runs 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Bringing Chrome to ARM64 Linux Devices 112 upvotes, 55 comments
  22. Peter Thiel's Antichrist Lectures 27 upvotes, 10 comments
  23. Never snooze a future 19 upvotes, 6 comments
  24. An old photo of a large BBS (2022) 198 upvotes, 134 comments
  25. AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. Source code of Swedish e-government services has been leaked 60 upvotes, 37 comments
  27. ATMs didn’t kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 433 upvotes, 452 comments
  28. US private credit defaults hit record 9.2% in 2025, Fitch says 375 upvotes, 423 comments
  29. Grief and the AI split 160 upvotes, 249 comments
  30. Show HN: What was the world listening to? Music charts, 20 countries (1940–2025) 3 upvotes, 4 comments

Last generated 7:30pm, 13 March 2026. Source here.
